column6: Tri-tech prox, LEAF, contactless FIDO2 from Ingenia

- Special prox-filter
- On AMAG, currently ignoring facility code
- S10401 (oem code of 9)



# Enable Prox-Filter W37-4 with Badge ID >= 241,200,000
BS_SET, FILTER , BS_FILTER_LF
BS_AUG, FILTER , BS_FILTER_FUNC_ME
BS_SET, NUM_BITS , 37
BS_FILTER_MASK, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_MASK, 1 , 0x3F
BS_FILTER_MASK, 2 , 0xFF
BS_FILTER_MASK, 3 , 0xFF
BS_FILTER_MASK, 4 , 0xFE

BS_FILTER_VALUE, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 1 , 0x1C
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 2 , 0xC0
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 3 , 0xD7
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 4 , 0x00

column1: ND 10-7-25: Need to change programming.... Changing from W37-1 to W37-4.
